nl_query: What is the average time between exam schedule creation and board creation?
failed_sql: SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.created_at - esc.created_at)) / 86400) AS avg_time_between_creation FROM board b JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.id = b.exam_id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'esc.created_at' does not exist. The Postgres planner suggests 'b.created_at' — use that, or verify the column belongs to the qualifying table in your FROM/JOIN clauses.
